description: [ELON] Verify Express route mounting order and middleware chain. Ensure Clerk auth middleware is correctly configured and routes are mounted in proper order (health check first, auth middleware, then protected routes). Check that all route handlers are actually imported and mounted.
successCriteria: All route imports are present and not undefined
Clerk middleware is applied before protected routes
Route mounting order follows: health → auth → api routes
No route path conflicts or duplicates
